mapper.select: select DISTINCT ON (cr.chat_room_id) m.name as partnerName, cm.is_read, cm.message_content, cm.sent_at from chat_room cr INNER JOIN chat_message cm on cr.chat_room_id = cm.chat_room_id INNER JOIN member m on cr.trainer_id = m.member_id where cr.member_id = #{memberId} order by cr.chat_room_id, sent_at desc

select DISTINCT ON (cr.chat_room_id) m.name as partnerName, cm.is_read, cm.message_content, cm.sent_at from chat_room cr INNER JOIN chat_message cm on cr.chat_room_id = cm.chat_room_id INNER JOIN member m on cr.member_id = m.member_id where cr.trainer_id = #{memberId} order by cr.chat_room_id, sent_at desc;
